title: School Lunches/Snacks - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Food > School Lunches/Snacks 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF INFORMATIONAL RECORD FREE AND REDUCED COST BREAKFAST AND LUNCH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The National School Lunch Program (NSLP) and the School Breakfast Program (SBP) are federally-assisted meal programs in public and nonprofit private schools and residential childcare institutions. These programs provide nutritionally balanced, low-cost, and free breakfasts and lunches. Schools and childcare centers may offer other nutrition programs, such as after-school snacks. Confidential Address Eligibility: -Children at participating schools whose families have incomes at or below 300% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) qualify for free meals. -Children at participating schools may qualify for reduced meals dependent on family size and household income. Hours: Varies, contact child's school for more information Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
